summary: Iter 174 — Owner-only Edit/Delete with transfer-state lock for Raw Materials. Both backend (pytest 7/7) and frontend (Playwright UI) flows verified end-to-end. All 11 review checkpoints pass.
critical_code_review_comments: _get_transferred_material_ids and _is_material_transferred intentionally ignore tenant_id (UUID is unique). Comment in code explains it; acceptable for backwards-compat with legacy movements lacking tenant_id, but be aware: cross-tenant material_id collisions would be incorrectly flagged. Low risk since all IDs are UUIDv4.
Update PUT endpoint allows full payload replace (RawMaterialCreate model). Consider partial update (PATCH-style) to avoid clients resending all fields — minor UX/contract concern, not breaking.

Frontend: edit/delete buttons use both `disabled` attribute AND inline guard `() => !material.is_transferred && setEdit...`. Defensive double-check is fine. Tooltip via title attribute works (verified: 'مقفلة — تم التحويل للتصنيع').
WarehouseManufacturing.js is now ~3989 lines — recommend splitting RawMaterialsTab, EditDialog, DeleteDialog into separate files for maintainability.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — all data-testids present and behaviour correct

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_iter174_lock raw material via POST /raw-materials-new, updated it via PUT, then deleted it via DELETE — all cleaned up. Tomato gained +1 kg via add-stock (intentional, proves add-stock works post-transfer). The page also already had several TEST_Material_* leftovers from prior iterations — not modified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file /app/backend/tests/test_raw_material_lock_iter174.py is reusable as regression. Run with: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=<url> pytest backend/tests/test_raw_material_lock_iter174.py -v. The test depends on tomato (id=c4b3b488-011b-4fdb-a4b7-c5f3c76033d1) remaining in transferred state — if seed data is reset and tomato no longer has fulfilled manufacturing_request or out movements, test_put_transferred_returns_409 / test_delete_transferred_returns_409 / test_add_stock_works_after_transfer assertions will need a fresh transferred material ID.

backend.GET_/api/raw-materials-new: returns is_transferred/can_edit/can_delete on every material; tomato is_transferred=True, can_edit=False, can_delete=False; can_edit always equals NOT is_transferred.
backend.DELETE_non_transferred: 200; subsequent GET single → 404; not in list anymore (also removes material_cost_layers per code, dropped via delete_many).

frontend.tomato_card: Pencil + Trash buttons rendered with class containing opacity-40, disabled attr present, title='مقفلة — تم التحويل للتصنيع'. Clicking does NOT open edit dialog.
frontend.non_transferred_card: Pencil click opens [data-testid=edit-raw-material-dialog] containing edit-rm-name-input, edit-rm-quantity-input, edit-rm-cost-input, edit-rm-save-btn. Trash click opens [data-testid=delete-raw-material-dialog] with delete-rm-confirm-btn.
frontend.admin_visibility: Pencil/Trash rendered for admin only (gated by isAdmin in JSX line ~1509). Verified by code review; not re-tested as non-admin user.
